ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data collection */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the data collection */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the data collection */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday of the data collection (0-6, where 0 is Sunday and 6 is Saturday) */,
  "holiday" REAL /* Holiday status (1 for holiday, 0 for non-holiday) */,
  "daylight" INTEGER /* Daylight status (1 for daylight, 0 for night) */,
  "rain" REAL /* Rain intensity (in millimeters per hour) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Traffic volume (in vehicles per 15 minutes) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (in percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in kilometers per hour) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, East, South, West) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident that occurred at the same time and location */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that was active at the same time and location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., traffic camera, flow sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the sensor */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "traffic_signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic signal at the location */,
  "incident_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of incidents at the location */,
  "alert_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of alerts at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the holiday (e.g., national, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daylight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daylight status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the daylight status (e.g., daylight, night) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the daylight status */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the daylight status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rain_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rain level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the rain level (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  "min_intensity" REAL /* Minimum intensity for the rain level */,
  "max_intensity" REAL /* Maximum intensity for the rain level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic volume level */,
  "volume_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic volume level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "min_volume" REAL /* Minimum volume for the traffic volume level */,
  "max_volume" REAL /* Maximum volume for the traffic volume level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, traffic analyst, maintenance crew) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (in percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in kilometers per hour) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, East, South, West) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the signal is situated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the traffic signal (e.g., pedestrian, vehicle) */,
  "green_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the green light (in seconds) */,
  "yellow_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the yellow light (in seconds) */,
  "red_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the red light (in seconds) */,
  "cycle_time" INTEGER /* Total cycle time of the signal (in seconds) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the signal */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date of the signal */,
  "signal_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the signal timings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the incident occurrence */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the incident */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_damage" REAL /* Estimated financial damage of the incident */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who responded to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data used in the report */,
  "data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data used in the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., traffic, incident, maintenance) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert occurrence */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the alert occurred */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., traffic jam, road closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
